name: EXELIXIS, INC.
summary: Exelixis, Inc. is a oncology-focused biopharmaceutical company that discovers, develops, and commercializes cancer treatments. The company's key marketed product is cabozantinib, sold under the brand names Cabometyx and Cometriq, approved for renal cell carcinoma, hepatocellular carcinoma, and differentiated thyroid cancer. Exelixis also has a pipeline of additional oncology compounds in clinical development.

products.name: Cabometyx
products.description: Cabozantinib formulation approved for renal cell carcinoma and hepatocellular carcinoma

products.name: Cometriq
products.description: Cabozantinib formulation approved for progressive, metastatic medullary thyroid cancer
